gauge.name: Cedar Run near Aden

impacts.statement: Fleetwood Road and Aden Road are both flooded by at least five feet of flowing water. Water approaches homes near Aden and several outbuildings are flooded.
Fleetwood Road and a significant portion of Aden Road are flooded near Cedar Run. Water approaches outbuildings near Aden.
Water begins to cover Aden Road near Aden. Several acres of agricultural land are flooded near Aden. An access road near Cedar Run on Quantico Marine Base may also begin to flood.
Fleetwood Road floods near Cedar Run.
Water spills over the banks, affecting agricultural land near Aden.

dataAttribution.text: Virginia Tech Occoquan Watershed Monitoring Laboratory
dataAttribution.title: VT Occoquan Monitoring Laboratory

hydronotes.statement: Stage may be affected by ice.

gauge.forecastReliability: Forecasts are not available. Only observed stages are available for this point.
